reviews.positives: Location next to train airport monastery and park
reviews.negatives: room location

reviews.title: Good location, good service, but no heater
reviews.text: Can't figure out to turn on the heater

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It’s an OK place to stay for an early flight out of Narita Airport. It’s dated and smells funky but for 7 hours it was just fine

reviews.title: Nearest to the station.
reviews.text: Located very near to the station just couple of minutes. Friendly staff especially a Nepalese girl. Clean rooms and worth the price.

reviews.title: Good option if you need to stay close to the narita airport. The small Narita town is very nice.
reviews.positives: Room dimension and distance from the metro station
reviews.negatives: My room was in the 2nd bulding. the corridors between the main building and the second are quite dirty

reviews.title: It's right in front of the station, the location is good.
reviews.text: I arrived late and just wanted to sleep, so I made a reservation. It was right in front of the station, so there were many restaurants and a convenience store right nearby, which was convenient. However, the accommodation feels a bit old. If you're looking for a place right in front of the station, I recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Did the trick
reviews.positives: Super close to both train stations. The room was big enough for 4 futons for the family which was great!
reviews.negatives: It was very old and therefore had a bit of a smell. For the price, I think I would stay somewhere else that is a bit more updated and that had more amenities.

reviews.title: Good enough
reviews.text: It's nothing fancy. The hotel looks old and dated, but it gets the job done.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Was a good size room, great for a night flight coming into Narita. Was quick to get to from the airport. Location was really great, near 7/11 and family mart, train station was right around the corner. Can recommend for a 1 night stay
reviews.negatives: The room could have been cleaner, the walls were a bit dirty along with the curtains. Air con hardly worked and was a little inconvenient getting to the room 2 elevators and multiple hallways.

reviews.title: Old and sad
reviews.text: Walks all scuffed, decor is from the 80s snd there were little bugs on the shower curtains. Being near the train station also means a noisy sleep but we were too tired to be affected but couldn’t wait to get out of there asap. Bed was also uncomfortable and could feel the springs,

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Excellent location. Good value.
reviews.negatives: It does look a little rundown but that shouldn’t impact someone’s desire to stay here. It’s a very minor cosmetic issue.

reviews.title: Bathroom
reviews.text: So much stain and moldy cover on surrounding water tap base and knob. Cup are cover yellow stain inside the base edge area.

reviews.title: Great location but perhaps a tiny hazard for your health
reviews.positives: We had to change our room a couple of times because of the mold in the bathroom. I had a very helpful patient staff, he was from Vietnam and if I remember right, a trainee. He did a great job. His Japanese and English language skills were good. He was the most helpful of all the foreign staff members. I don't mind the dated interior at all, I do care about cleanliness.
reviews.negatives: Black mold in the bathroom

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Old hotel, Aircon not working well, near railway station and can hear the noise when trains pass by

reviews.title: Great location. Average room.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Room smell

reviews.title: Too Good to be True
reviews.text: This is a very low budget, old and worn hotel. Our room was large, but felt very damp and smelled a little moldy. In retrospect, we should have paid more to stay ina better hotel. This property has potential, but needs a major renovation.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Friendly reception staff. Rooms available last minute (I booked a room that evening)! Great location.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: the hotel should recarpet.  It is very old and musty.  I am aware that Japan was hit hard due to covid but they should consider tiling rather than carpet.

reviews.title: I’ll be back
reviews.positives: I’ve stayed here 3 times twice in one year. The last time it took 2 elevator rides and about half a block walk to get to my room. I love the small town vibe and the big city amenities. Local and regional train stations sandwich the hotel
reviews.negatives: The price of the breakfast buffet was a little steep

reviews.title: Super Near to Station
reviews.text:
The hotel is a bit old and dark.
But the location is very good, 3 mins walk from station.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives:
Very convenient, we had early morning flight and this hotel is close to the airport. 
Rooms look bit older, but clean and have all you need. We stayed for one night and all ok.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
There’s no heater so in the winter quite cold. The staff told me to turn off the AC but still cold. And the bathroom room had a musty smell. 
Near the Keisei Station and the price was reasonable.

reviews.title: Great location + good for a very short stay
reviews.positives: This location is perfect. It’s literally a three minute walk from the train.
reviews.negatives: It was definitely dated and a little bit spooky in our opinion. It’s like going back in time and was definitely not upgraded in anyway in the past 20 years that said it was clean enough.

reviews.title: Great place to stay before catching a flight.
reviews.text: The location is fantastic! Its proximity to Keisei Narita and JR Narita stations, surrounded by restaurants and convenience stores, is very convenient. Unfortunately, the discovery of a cockroach in the room was a major setback. The cleanliness was therefore unsatisfactory. The room amenities were nice, but the air conditioning system was slow to cool the room, which was uncomfortable given the summer heat in Japan.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location is closest to keisei Narita station and down town.
reviews.negatives: This is the only hotel that has very old toilet equipment, no auto clean function. And the room we stayed (annex) is very far from front building. And no guest there.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very near the MTR , bus abd tram stations. Rooms are clean and spacious. Staff are courteous . Rooms are cleaned everyday and towels are changed daily, too. Whenever we go to Hongkong, we always choose thus hotel. Indeed, it’s our favorite!

reviews.title: I really liked the location & staff. Did not like the worn down appearance of the hotel. The sushi restaurant did no
reviews.positives: Location, staff, bar discount
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was the same everyday, scrambled eggs were runny and slimy. The laundry room was very unkept and dingy/scary. The hotel itself needs updates and refurbishing. The first day my room had an awful musty/mold smell! I opened the window and ran the AC full blast over night and sprayed the room with the deodorizer spray in the room… it was much better the next morning. If staying only one night, this would have been awful. The hallway needs ventilated (open windows) everyday. Very foul musty smelling. Sushi restaurant: food excellent, no English Menu, needs updated… looked rundown. Japanese restaurant: dirt they tried to seat me in a back room with kitchen storage, I said no, ordered chicken/sauce and it came with nothing else and served cold. Waitress disappeared and no one came back except when I flagged a girl for check and she took my credit card off the table and started to walk off, I said no, bill first (everyone struggled with the language barrier). I have been to Japan twice for extended stays and this was the worst dining experience. They wouldn’t even allow me to buy rice to add to my dish. I went out for another meal after, I paid a lot and was hungry.

reviews.title: No frills, great for morning flights
reviews.text: Had a pleasant stay. There is nothing fancy but it's really at a very convenient location especially if you need to get to Narita airport early. It is also near eateries and a 商店街 (Japanese local shopping street).

reviews.title: I think my stay was good
reviews.positives: I like the location
reviews.negatives: The bed was like a rock and the the pillows were terrible.

reviews.title: Needs an update but great location
reviews.text: We booked this hotel because it advertised an airport transfer. Note: there is NONE. It even says it in the hotel book, but none available. It is very close to 2 train stations: Keisei line and JR. Keisei line takes you to the airport Terminals in  minutes.  The hotel room itself is clean. The hallways smell and one whole passage way smells of wet carpet quite badly. The hotel itself needs the carpets replaced. The staff were very helpful and gave a small heater when needed. Location is key to transport and eating restaurants. An interesting temple and park a short walk away (1km).

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.positives: Location was great
reviews.negatives: No washlet in the room’s toilet

reviews.title: Solo traveler
reviews.text:
As a solo traveler, staying per night for early morning flight, worth every penny as the room is spacious even with luggage bag fully open, just directly opposite the hotel there is nearby convenient store. 
However the downside of the bathroom tend to have a moldy smell and the switch lighting is kind of old. If it's bother you do use the air purifier spray.

reviews.title: Good location but noisy outside and no A/C
reviews.positives: Good location, good value. Easy for a quick night before a flight.
reviews.negatives: Could have been a little cleaner. Location being so close to the train, if you stay in the annex building your window is right above the tracks and station which is very loud at night. Espescially if you want fresh air as there is no A/C control in the rooms.

reviews.title: Air quality and no safely box  in room
reviews.text: Hotel location is excellent as the train station is nearby and convenient to find restaurants and bar. However, bad odor is full in bathroom at my room I need to open window to circulate some fresh air to dilute those bad smell. I wonder why no safely box in room?

reviews.title: Good location but old hotel
reviews.positives: Great location, near the train station but not too near.
reviews.negatives: The rooms are old and the overall facilities can use a renovation.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good value bur the facilities were rather old.

reviews.title: Very practical location
reviews.positives: Super convenient location, just around the corner from two stations, about a 15 minute walk from the shopping street, shrine, and park. Friendly and efficient staff. Room was fine, for the low price the quality was very good.
reviews.negatives: The elevator closed on my suitcase in a way that made us very concerned every time we had to get in and out. The place hasn't been updated in decades and the beds were a little uncomfortable, but the price was so low it really doesn't matter.

reviews.title: 立地
reviews.text: 駅近く便利でした。

reviews.title: Great facility, staff, and amenities, it may be a bit warm during the winter in the room.
reviews.positives: Great facility and the staff was kind, room service came everyday to tidy up the room as needed.
reviews.negatives: The heater would turn on making sleeping a bit warm at night, and there was no way to turn it off. So, I had to open the window at night; unfortunately, due to the how busy traffic was in the area it would get a bit loud at day and night.

reviews.title: スタッフはとても親切
reviews.text:
フロントのスタッフがとても親切でした。
お部屋は少し年季が入っていてタバコのにおいも少しありました。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location. But the facility and comfortable of bed have to improve

reviews.title: Best hotel for going home
reviews.text:
If you are looking for a hotel to stay in before a flight next morning, this would be the best hotel. Sleep, have a nice breakfast in the morning and off to Keisei Train to Narita for 270 yen. There are no ramp from the hotel to the train platform to Narita.

Hotel is quite old, and the design is not the latest, even the toilet taps are weirdly configure with pull push design. But overall a comfortable stay before your flight.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Walking distance to restaurants
reviews.negatives: No airport shuttle bus like before

reviews.title: Reasonable Hotel at Narita
reviews.text:
The great advantage of Hotel Welco is its location in downtown Narita, you can get there quickly and easily by train. Quality is good, but over full of tourist groups. I could not in three days sort out opening hours of the restaurants and bar but that is normal in post-COVID Japan.
Overall OK as a layover hotel after a long flight into Narita. Better situation than most other Narita hotels so I recommend

reviews.title: Good hotel but it need to improve
reviews.positives: The hotel is divided into two areas and is conveniently located near the JR station. The staff are excellent, and the rooms are spacious, with free parking and reasonable prices. It is easy to plan to airport in morning.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is quite old, and the bathroom was very dirty and in need of maintenance. I stayed for two nights and requested a room change for the second night because I was uncomfortable in the original room. The staff kindly agreed, but the new room was located near the railway, which could be noisy at times.

reviews.title: Heater is not ok.
reviews.text:
The heating is insufficient.
The location is good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location
reviews.negatives: Hotel could use some updating and cleaning. Elevators are old looking/dingy

reviews.title: Best location
reviews.text:
This hotel is located between JR Narita station and Keisei Narita station. You can take either JR or Keisei railway easily.
The room is big compared with other business hotels.

reviews.title: Our stay was comfortable enough - location great- staff were great too! Loved the Village.
reviews.positives:
This Hotel is right beside the Railway Stations which was convenient- and direct access to the Village of Narita. We also walked to the Shopping Mall. 
The Staff were very helpful.
reviews.negatives: This Hotel is quite in need of Renovations - it was clean - our room had new carpets but old everything else. The Air Conditioning did not work but we managed to swing the window open. We also got a fan from the front desk. Had lots of hot water for a Shower.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Reasonably priced hotel with a good location in Narita.
Not exactly an airport hotel, but it's only a train stop from Narita airport.
Loads and loads of eateries around and for any foodies, Hotel Welco will be a good choice.
Omotesando street is just a short walk away with lots of eateries, souvenirs and arts and crafts shop and local food products.
And for eel lovers, walk the stretch of omotesando street almost till the end and look for Kawatoyo Honten for the best, that is if you are lucky to find a seat.

reviews.title: Worth for money
reviews.positives: Location, very near keisei train and bus station just 200m. Walk
reviews.negatives: Air condition system.

reviews.title: Alright
reviews.text: This hotel seems to be a bit old, the bathroom was always moist as well which was a bit strange to us. When we arrived to our hotel room we did smell mildew. However all in all the room was clean and the staff was pretty nice. Things looked a bit dated within our room and a bit stained. Besides the aesthetics, this hotel was in an extremely convenient location! Overall we were happy.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good size and price.
reviews.negatives: The room and floor was very musty/moldy smelling. I believe it came from the AC unit, very unpleasant.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
This hotel is very good when you want to be near Narita Airport, very near the train station and lovely surroundings, a walk to a temple, the shopping area. 
The staff is very helpful and nice.
My single room was a bit small and the bathroom needs refurbishing.
At breakfast the croissants and pains au chocolat were not very fresh.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hotel location is close to train station, bus stop. There are many restaurant and convenience store nearby.
reviews.negatives: The room was old and some part of hotel not okay.

reviews.title: nice location
reviews.text:
I stayed at Welco Narita for a flight stopover. The location is less than 5 minutes walking distance from Narita Station (not the airport). The location is close with several restaurants. Its around 15 minutes walk to Narita Temple so I did spend the morning before my flight exploring the temple.

The interior is quite nice and spacious. I got two single beds. The room is on the annex building so its a bit of a hassle to go there. You'd have to take the elevator to a certain floor, then walk a bit then take the another elevator. But overall the experience is quite nice

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: They should improve their air conditioners.

reviews.title: very good loved the bath really deep great for short people! Not sure about air con !
reviews.text: clean,Does the job for one night loved the deep bath,clean sheets.cons staff on reception not very welcoming!good location

reviews.title: Location
reviews.positives: Close to train station. Also close to Narita airport.
reviews.negatives: We stayed Japanese style room. Futon is great, but power outlets is not close we laid down.

reviews.title: Clean, near to JR and bus to AEON
reviews.text:
Short 1 night layover. My first time staying in Narita. Really convenient place. Has airport shuttle (please check the timings). Very close to JR. Bus to AEON nearby just a few steps away. Has McDonalds around the corner. Convenient store opp hotel. 

Room is sufficient. Spacious as compared to traditional hotels in japan. Clean. But our room wasn’t in the main building so it’s quite a walk away but no complains. Recommended 👍

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The location to the light rail system was convenient. 
The front desk check-in staff was knowledgeable  and courteous.
reviews.negatives:
Slightly awkward door openings and widths for entering the room and bathroom.
The large step up for the bathroom.entrance. was overly tall
It seemed more than 6 inches in height.

reviews.title: Tokyo Hotel
reviews.text: This is more of a business travel stay hotel.  Rooms are a bit old with musky smell.

reviews.title: Totally fine
reviews.positives: Very close to Keisei Nairta. We have morning flight and this is a good choice to stay.
reviews.negatives: There was another group of guests and they made loud noise.

reviews.title: Overnight stay for early flight from Narita
reviews.text: This place is perfect if you have an early flight out of Narita. It’s steps away from the train station and the airport is just 2 stops away.

reviews.title: Good location to stay for early flight at narita airport
reviews.positives:
About 1 minute walk from the train station. 
Lots of eateries and shops nearby. There is a public bus that takes you to aeon mall. Room is spacious.
reviews.negatives: There is no instruction on how to use the heater. We had to open the window because the room was so warm. Good thing it was winter.

reviews.title: Near the train station.
reviews.text: Near Narita train station, comfortable, large rooms at a reasonable price. The hotel may be old but has complete facilities.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location to Narita station is very close to the hotel
reviews.negatives:
Room did not have heater, some odour/smell.
The hotel is quite old.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Close to airport. Close to trains. Easy to navigate area. Close to the temple

reviews.title: Great facility but left traumatised by the next door room
reviews.positives: Big size rooms and easy communication
reviews.negatives:
There is no sound proof on the walls 😭
I could hear what next door was doing…

reviews.title: It’s okay
reviews.text: Good location to visit and go to airport

reviews.title: Unfortunately this hotel doesn’t meet my expectation. I won’t stay there again.
reviews.positives: Location was excellent. The size of room was great. And Althea stuff were friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The room was nicely vacuumed but the building itself is old. Smells weird. Bathroom has lot of molds that produce odor. Also the room does t have temperature control. My elderly mother was so cold ended up catching cold next day.

reviews.title: Bit old hotel
reviews.text: good location, not so clean.

reviews.title: Good stay reasonable price staff pleasant good location.
reviews.positives:
Good size room with side boards to put things on and to have a table and two chairs too.  
Pool/billiards table a plus point in the sports bar!
Good location opposite the station and convenient store, close to all amenities around the station as well as Narita Temple and its grounds. 
One stop from Narita airport or around 15mins drive.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast vouchers could have been more flexible (got 5 out of 7 mornings stay) but had to be spent on the first to the fifth day.  Food ranges were good though.

reviews.title: Great cost performance!
reviews.text: It was about 7,000 yen for a one-night stay for two people. I was scared because there were mentions of bedbugs in the reviews, but there were no problems. The receptionist was a foreigner but spoke fluent Japanese, and we were also given a complimentary 500ml bottle of water. The room was not too small, and at this price point, it was good. There was a mention that the bath had a musty smell, but it seemed pretty typical. The parking was free, but be careful as it is quite narrow!

reviews.title: Prime location  near Narita Train station
reviews.positives: Prime location just in front of Narita Train station. Public transportation is  in walking distance and nearby The Naritasan Senshoji.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is a bit old and staffs less speaking English.

reviews.title: Convenient location
reviews.text: It is very convenient as the hotel is opposite Motomachi station. I also like the laundry facility and breakfast lounge.

reviews.title: Ok for the price
reviews.text: I stayed for 2 nights. First in the main tower and second night in the annex. I noticed that the rooms in the main tower were better and more comfortable. Breakfast is too basic for the price, so next time I would just use convenience store instead. Rooms were the lowest standard we had on our trip, but clean enough and the location couldn’t be better, so it’s ok for the price, if it’s just a quick stay before flight.

reviews.title: Hot hotel room, great food places.
reviews.positives: Loved it was near the train station, had nice food spots and hidden gems for sure
reviews.negatives: No controlled AC unit in the rooms, it was so damn hot.

reviews.title: Great place for a pit stop in between destinations
reviews.text: We have a 1 year old so this is an ideal place for a quick rest before/after a long flight. We stay there for the first night after landing at Narita, then travel to Sapporo the next day. We also booked our last night in Japan there to catch the early flight next morning back to Vietnam. Staff were friendly and helpful. Room and facilities in general are a bit obsolete, need some renovation.

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.text:
Really  like the location.
If u are catching an early flight,please consider the option to stay here.
Also Narita park is worth the viewing

reviews.title: Narita weekend
reviews.text:
The hotel was pretty basic. Good location between both local and JR stations and lots of restaurants nearby. There was even a cool bar with a billiards table. We had 8 draft beers and played pool for about an hour for ¥5,000. 

Narita area itself is pretty dead. You won’t find much for nightlife. Lots of golf courses in the area but ridiculously expensive. Paid ¥25,000 for a course that’d usually cost ¥8,000 anywhere else in Japan.

reviews.title: Adequate
reviews.text: For what you pay and where you're located it's no! The grounds are a little dated and the rooms feel a little dank. They allowed us to leave our luggage while we explored on our last day. The train ride back to the airport is a short one. I could definitely see myself staying here again if the price stays the same.

reviews.title: Convenience
reviews.text: If you need to be in Narita for some reason, or need to be near the airport for an early flight, you can't beat this place. It's seen better days, but the upkeep is good. Walking distance to train stations, convenience stores and restaurants.

reviews.title: Stopover stay
reviews.text: Spent a night at the hotel for an early departure the next day. Great location. Hotel a bit basic and old.

reviews.title: Just a few steps from Keisei Narita station
reviews.text: Located just a stone throw away from Keisei Narita station, makes this hotel a perfect transit hotel for an early flight the next day. All the basic amenities are provided. The hotel may be a bit old, but it is clean and comfortable. Definitely will recommend to friends.

reviews.title: GREAT LOCATION
reviews.text: Around the corner from Kisei  Narita station

reviews.title: great
reviews.text: great

reviews.title: great place for a short stay
reviews.text: We stayed there overnight to help with connections at Narita Airport. Nothing wrong with the place. You do need to get a train to the hotel which is cheap and when you come out of the station its about a 2 minute walk. Room was clean, shower great. Bed was good too

reviews.title: Great location but hotel a bit old
reviews.text: The hotel facade is old. Bare lighting internally. But the location is great!

reviews.title: strategic location
reviews.text: located between kesei-narita stn and narita stn. a minute walk from both station. Lots of restaurants are within walking distance.

reviews.title: if only for transit
reviews.text: If you only need this for transit when it too early or to dark to go town, it just 1 stop from Narita airport

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Good location near to Mobara mrt. Quite clean and hospitable staff.

reviews.title: Air-conditioner was not working properly
reviews.text: The location was great, just next to the JR station. The room was enough for four people and the toilet and bathroom was big. Everything was great except the air-conditioner. The staff couldn't fix the problem and gave us two fans. It was August but luckily it was about 28 degree Celsius so we could withstand for one night. Based on the staff reaction, maybe it was the only room which the air-con was not working properly. If the staff read my comment, please address the issue.

reviews.title: Spacious room beside Narita station
reviews.text: a much more affordable hotel beside Narita station for those planning to take morning flight at narita airport. It is just one stop 7 minutes away from narita airport terminal station.
reviews.room_type: Triple room, No view, Non-smoking (Triple Room [Non-Smoking] ☆ Free High-Speed Wi-Fi)

reviews.title: Hotel is ok
reviews.text: Okay

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: It was very nice to stay there because it was just across a big convenient store and very near the station.

reviews.title: Hotel welco
reviews.text: Good service

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very handy, right near the station. Small but clean rooms.

reviews.title: Transit to visit Narita san
reviews.text: A good location to stay for a night to visit Narita san and Shinshoji temple nearby

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Pleasent stay.

reviews.title: Hotel next to Keisei line
reviews.text:
1 min walk from Keisei-Narita station. 2 Stops to Narita Airport T1, great if you have an early flight and do not want to rush, but price is higher. Its JPY270 for adult to T1.

10 mins walk to Aeon Town but dun bother to eat at food court, nothing great

reviews.title: Excellent value for money
reviews.text: Pleasant stay at a strategic location for transit.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: This hotel is a situated just round the corner of the Narita Keisei station and so has an excellent location. It is a bit worn out but otherwise has all the amenities that a decent Japanese business hotel should have.  There are also quite a lot of restaurants for a hotel of this size. Great value for money and will book again if stay in this area!

reviews.title: Quick stop before flying out
reviews.text:
Very convenient location, friendly staff and decent sized clean rooms.
Only one minor issue with the air conditioning in winter, the room temp is a bit too warm

reviews.title: Near station and restaurants
reviews.text: Our room is the japanese style room , had a good sleep even though the pillow is different .

reviews.title: Handy hotel
reviews.text:
Welco hotel is easy walking distance from the station, the staff are very helpful and friendly and the room was a good size although a little overheated. 
Although the decor is rather dated and shabby, I would be very happy to stay there again.

reviews.title: Location near to bus and train station
reviews.text: The staff were helpful. Bought crabs and prawns and they help us to keep it frozen. They also provide free shuttle to and from airport.

reviews.title: Place to relax before leaving exciting Tokyo
reviews.text: The hotel is nearby Kesei - Narita station. Lot of shops and restuarant nearby. Good place to relax before heading to Narita airport just Half an hour journey away.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great location near everything you want to do in town. Easy to get to by hotel shuttle and by train. Clean, good sized rooms. Regular checkout is 11:00, late checkout is 12:00 and free, later checkout at 1:00pm has a small fee and is perfect for 1:30 hotel shuttle to airport!

reviews.title: Narita Station Base
reviews.text: This hotel is very good for it's price range and category. It is just a corner away as you exit Keisei Narita Train Station.  It's an easy walk to the gorgeous Naritasan  Temple, easy access to Aeon Mall by bus and 1 train stop from the Narita Airport Terminal2 (2 stops for Terminal1) .  Lots of restaurant choices for the nearby Omotesando Street which is the town's main strip. Very nice location indeed!

reviews.title: Good size and comfortable  room. Very location
reviews.text:
Hotel needs refreshing, bathroom need refreshing, need to have Handy phone and phone charger by the bed
No. 1 in location less than 5 min walk from Station, good size room 22m2, comfortable room and bed, supper buffet Resturant by the lobby, staffs good, good spread of schedules for free airport shuttle, Narita is about an hour to Ueno (Tokyo) for less than 900¥, hotels in Narita cost half of that in Tokyo. I love Narita- more relaxing. Will definitely come back to Welco ( ex Mercure)

reviews.title: Great location and good size room
reviews.text: Great location, good size room, good price and comfortable booking  through Agoda. Hotel a bit run down. Had no Handy phone and no USB Port. for iphone. Had a great buffet Resturant need reservation for lunch. Will come back.

reviews.title: Close to Station
reviews.text:
I had mistakenly booked a room for a single person, but the receptionist allowed us to stay with an additional fee for the other person. Would have rated it Excellent but staff mocked us and was condescending towards us thinking we didn't understand Japanese. Only thing keeping me from rating it 'Awful' was they still let us stay though but didn't provide the addtional person with toiletries although we paid an additional 3,500 yen.

The room itself was refurbished but you can still see traces of old furniture. Room was supposedly Non-smoking but you can clearly smell the smoke lingering.

Location was very close to the JR Narita and Keisei Narita stations and a lot of Izakayas, Family Mart and Lawson were 2 minutes walk away. McDo was very close as well.

reviews.title: Very good location.
reviews.text:
Just a 2-minute walk from KS station.  
Large room with enough space for luggage for 2 people.  
Old room, but clean.  
Japanese staff are indifferent, but foreign staff are very helpful.

reviews.title: The annex is inconvenient.
reviews.text: The facilities and services were satisfactory. The parking lot was surprisingly free, which was helpful. It was a room in the annex, but I felt that the narrow corridor made it difficult to pass by others when carrying a lot of luggage. Also, the entrance to the annex was in the underground parking lot, and I found that its entrance was not easy to find, which was disappointing. Overall, I think it is a nice place as it is close to the station.

reviews.title: Good hotel and value for money
reviews.text: Me and my friends rented two rooms here since it is near to Narita airport .  It is 5 minutes walk to the train station and convenient.  There are quite a lot of restaurants of eateries nearby . There is also a buddhist temple nearby if you like to take photos.

reviews.title: Comfortable Stay with Great Amenities
reviews.text: The property offers spacious rooms and excellent housekeeping, ensuring a comfortable experience. The facilities are top-notch, making it easy to relax and unwind. While the Wi-Fi service could use improvement and shopping options nearby are limited, the overall cleanliness and attentive staff contribute positively to the stay. It's a solid choice for those looking for convenience and comfort.

reviews.title: Near the train station.
reviews.text: The hotel may not be new, but it is clean and meets the standards of a typical Japanese hotel. The advantage is that it is close to the train station, and the rooms are relatively large compared to the same price range.

reviews.title: Near Kok Yai train station, the price is not expensive.
reviews.text: The hotel may not be new, but it is clean and meets the standards of a typical Japanese hotel. The advantage is its proximity to the train station, and the rooms are quite spacious compared to the same price range.

reviews.title: Accessibility from the airport
reviews.text: If you have an early morning flight at Narita, you may consider staying here.  You can take a cab or hop on the train as the station is near also. Lots of food options and convenience store around also

reviews.title: Conveniently close to the station.
reviews.text: The Keikyu and JR stations are nearby, and there is also a convenience store, which is convenient. The room is relatively spacious, and I think the soundproofing is quite good. However, there were some stains in the toilet, so I was a bit disappointed as I wondered if the cleaning was not thorough in that regard. It may have been a stain that wouldn't come off, but it didn't leave me with a good feeling.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Exceptional location, decent spot to stay over before flight

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: perfect for low cost 1 night stay in Narita however hotel is showing its age. Could do with some love to make it shine again

reviews.title: Basic clean hotel near airport
reviews.text: It is a basic hotel, clean, friendly staff, within 5 mins walk from the train station, very convenient for those who want to be close to the narita airport. Hotel does not offer shuttle service to and from the airport but it is easy to hop in a taxi or use the train to get in. There are many shops and restaurants within walking distance. A good choice!

reviews.title: GREAT AIRPORT HOTEL.
reviews.text: If u need to stay near NRT airport then this place is great. Otherwise it's very far from everything in Tokyo. It was a bit on the rough side in the Annex building.

reviews.title: Nice hotel for it being old
reviews.text: Hotel is roomy and bathroom is clean.  Location is great but be warn you will feel dust around the room. I felt itchy throughout my stay.

reviews.title: Luxury weekend
reviews.text:
One-person stay for business
I made a reservation because I could choose a slightly larger bed. However, it turned out to be a regular double room. Even so, at that time, it was the cheapest option around Narita Station. 
Since this time it was on the JR line, I was able to store my luggage before check-in, which was comfortable. 
I was only concerned about the parking, so I parked elsewhere. Next time, I think I will allow enough time to check the hotel parking before going elsewhere.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I'll definitely stay there in the future and will recommend it to my friends

reviews.title: 利便性◎静かに休める
reviews.text: 利便性の高さが1番の魅力です。JRも京成線も徒歩1,2分くらいの場所で空港まですぐ。ホテルの目の前にコンビニがあり周辺にも数件コンビニがあります。食べるところもありますが、ランチタイムは主にチェーンしか空いてない時

reviews.title: Really convenient to go everywhere
reviews.text: The location was good  It just only walk 5 minutes from station to hotel. Room is spacious that enough to keep two medium size luggage in the room.

reviews.title: Not free shuttle from airport
reviews.text: If you are looking for free shuttle bus, this isn’t one. We had to pay for the bus transfers to the hotel.  Another few mins walk from drop off point.

reviews.title: Near the station
reviews.text: It is convenient for strolling to Naritasan, as well as for eating and drinking while walking, and I have used it multiple times. I think it would be even better if the parking lot could be used before check-in. The room in the new building was spacious and comfortable. I think it would be good to have a power outlet by the bedside. I would like to use it again.

reviews.title: Love the location!
reviews.text: The hotel offers excellent value for money with its convenient location near both JR & Kesei Line. Transport to Aeon Mall is a 2 mins walk. Take 1 or 2 stops on train for bus to outlet mall. Staff are polite and most helpful.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Very near narita! I hope it will have a free shuttle to narita.

reviews.title: Shopping trip
reviews.text:
My family and I stayed in this hotel whenever we visited Japan and always recommend them to friends.  
Understand the bathroom was newly renovated, suggest adding one or two hooks in it.

reviews.title: Great stay with a few setbacks
reviews.text: The property offers good value for money with friendly staff. Housekeeping was excellent, ensuring cleanliness throughout. Hot water was consistent, providing comfort. However, challenges were faced with noise affecting sleep quality. Limited shopping options nearby and parking availability could be improved

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: Great value.

reviews.title: Superb location although  dated
reviews.text:
Although the hotel is dated but the room is roomy and everything is in working condition. 
Located in a superb location and easily accessible to train and bus stations. It is  within walking distance to eateries and convenience stores.

reviews.title: Overall just great
reviews.text:
The hotel just beside JR Keisei Narita Station along with bus/taxi station very convenient to stay for 1-2 days before flight.

The hotel is very old style but yet very clean. Just the room still have very heavy smoke smell even requested for non-smoking room.

reviews.title: 5 minutes of convenience
reviews.text: The hotel location is very convenient. It takes 3 minutes to walk to Narita Station. 5 minutes to Naritasan shopping street. 3 minutes to the Aeon Mall station. A 10-minute drive. The room size is comfortable at 20 square feet. A bit old-fashioned. The hotel staff are efficient and polite. It is a hotel worth recommending.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: suitable place if you arrive late evening..close to airport Narita

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
โรงแรมเก่า ห้องแอร์ไม่เย็นเลย แต่คืนเดียว เพราะตื่นแต่เช้าตรู่ไปสนามบิน เลยไม่อยากบ่น ถ้าไม่ใช่หน้าร้อนคงไม่มีปัญหา

 ข้อดีคือสะดวก เดินจากสถานีรถไฟ Keisei-Narita  เลี้ยวซ้ายเดินอีกสิบก้าวก็ถึงค่ะ

reviews.title: Conveniently located near Narita airport
reviews.text: My KLM flight out of Narita got cancelled and they offered me a night stay at a hotel in Shinagawa, which is more almost two hours ride from the airport.  After being unable to leave my luggage in storage at the airport, I found this very nice hotel in agoda.com and it really was a life saver. Great staff, good buffet breakfast service and a spacious room with a big bed.

reviews.title: Decent Room size
reviews.text: Twin beds Room size at the Annex building was big for Japan standard.  Need to access through 3rd level to the annex building.  Hotel is very close to 2 Subway stations and bus station.

reviews.title: 立地条件が良い
reviews.text: ちょうどいいところで利便性が高い

reviews.title: Staying for early flight
reviews.text: We stay here for the last day travel in Japan, convenient location to the train station and bus terminal. But we staying at lvl 6, and keep hearing noises from the upstairs room, dragging chairs or moving bed, running footsteps the whole night, we did call the reception to feedback  at around 10pm and ask reception to go and inform the guest upstairs to lower the noises, as we have a early flight to catch the next day. But the noise continues from 10plus until midnight, I plugged ear plug to sleep and when we wake up at 4am the noise still continue. Not sure if it's the sound proof wasn't good enough or what. But for the location is still good.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text:
Pro: Located near keisei Narita station 
          Room space is large.
          Near the business area, restaurants and grocery stores 
Con: No shuttle bus service 
           Room facilities are outdated 
       
Overall : Good for budgeting and easy to access via public transports

reviews.title: Room rate
reviews.text: I paid a higher room rate via Agoda booking system.

reviews.title: Close to Narita station
reviews.text: We had to change our room because of clocking toilet, staff kindly changed the room for us, but still the room smelled like cigarettes, very old to me

reviews.title: Great Location and Staff
reviews.text:
I had stayed here previously in 2019. This time round the facilities does start to show some signs of aging. I had no complain due to its room size, location near train and Naritasan Temple and pricing though, as it make itself a good 1 night stop for late flight to Narita before you transit the next day to Tokyo proper/other part of Japan. 

The room is decently size but the cleanliness could do better. The room does seem to begin showing their age now as there are crack on some part of walls and moss formed near the window. 

The staff are very nice however both at the front desk and the Breakfast cafe. 

The room facilities could do with some upgrade to better cater for modern travellers (more sockets etc for charging phone etc).

reviews.title: Pleasant Stay
reviews.text: Pleasant stay at a strategic location with attractions within walking distance.

reviews.title: Good for a simple night without the luxury
reviews.text: Simple 3star old hotel but functional and you dont want to pay a bomb for short stay.  Staff tries hard to please despite the old facilities the hotel have. Clean room with old fixtures

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Staff, location, food, price, all were all very good! But a better review is hampered by the fact that the facility is in great need of updating. Sadly it is a bit old and rundown.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Hotel is very closed to the train station and staffs are very friendly and helpful. The only downside is the room smells (dusty and old house smells)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Hotel feels a bit old but was clean. Nonetheless, it’s a great location since it’s right beside the train station. We stayed here as we’ve a flight to catch in the early morning at Narita airport.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Conveniently located for stay over at Narita

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: it was nice

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Location is great for going to narita in morning flight

reviews.title: Nice Hotel for 1-2 Nights
reviews.text: Great hotel for sightseeing around Narita. The hotel is 2 minutes from the Keisei Narita station and about 4 minutes from the JR Narita station. Word to the wise, ask for a room away from the train tracks if they put you up in the annex.

reviews.title: Hot shower, room relative spacious and close to the airport
reviews.text: The hotel is within 4 or 5 minutes walk from the subway station. From Narita Airport to the Narita city, it is only 5 or 6 minutes by train. If you come to Japan late in the evening and do not want to spend the time to travel a long way to Tokyo city, it should be a nice hotel to spend the first night visiting Japan.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: We arrived in Tokyo late and had an early flight out the next morning. The free hotel shuttle whisked us to the hotel about 20 minutes away where we had a great sleep. The breakfast buffet was great but costs extra.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Only con, the room was too warm and the air con set to pump in warm air during the winter. I had to sleep with the window open,  no big deal but I feel I should not have had to do that. Lucky there was very little traffic so not too much notice in the room.  Otherwise a good place to stay, this was my 4th stay at thks hotel (former Mercure)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Easy option close to Narita  airport. Fine for an overnight stay.

reviews.title: Very good location
reviews.text: Close to JR, Metro and car rental.  But not easy to get to the reception after parking.

reviews.title: A very good business hotel in downtown
reviews.text: Room was clean and comfortable. Very convenience location near train stations, bus stops, shops and restaurants. Just 10 minutes to Narita Airport by train.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is great!  It is within 5 minutes from de station, Keisei-Narita.  The building is old, but the rooms were neatly arranged and clean.  Besides the hotel breakfast, I also appreciated that they offered reasonably priced takeaway coffee and Danish pastries.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
stay this hotel many times. walking distance to train stations n shops.
Free airport transfer too.

reviews.title: Old-fashioned but perfect location
reviews.positives: Perfect location
reviews.negatives: Old-fashioned hotel

reviews.title: Stayed at this hotel before
reviews.text:
Have been using this hotel  after and before flights to and from New Zealand for over twenty years. 
Close to railway station, restaurants and wonderful attractions.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very close to both JR and Keisei stations.

reviews.title: Spacious room, close to the airport, but noisy.
reviews.text: The room is spacious, clean, and fully equipped, but the downside is that there is no air conditioning. If the room gets hot, you have to open the window, but when you do, it gets noisy because it is near the train track.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very good location next to narita station, the room is bigger than I imagine compare to the room hotel in Tokyo.
reviews.negatives: I can hear the next room talk.

reviews.title: Great Staff,  Hotel is now old needs updating in facilities
reviews.text: Formely a Mercure.   The hotel now needs tender loving care in some hallway carpets etc.  Great staff and very kind staff at breakfact, thank you. Well located if you get a good price but manage your expectations.  I guess Mercure group (Accor) did not want to invest in the hotel anymore.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Location and value. 
Luggage forwarding to them was easy. My luggage was there when I checked in close to midnight.
reviews.negatives:
Bathroom door was stuck. Needed to be opened with a coin.
If you are assigned to the annex building, it is a bit of a journey to get to your room.

reviews.title: Twin room
reviews.text: The room was as expected.  The location is convenient.  The staff were friendly.  Able to leave my bag after check out.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is great!
reviews.negatives: And new building doesn’t have the bidet. Otherwise, all is okay.

reviews.title: 1 night stay
reviews.text: Good hotel for a 1 night stay in Narita. Served its purpose as we arrived in the evening and wanted a place to recharge.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Close to the  station and bus stop. Very good location.
reviews.negatives:
After check out, we noticed we forgot to take  the toothbrush from the room for flight. In the room we used our own toothbrush and kept it for flight. So we asked at the reception, if we can have 2 toothbrush. But  reception guy said you are already checked out so you can’t have it. We felt embarrassed  from how he treated us. 
I always stay this hotel the before my flight. But never had this kind of experience.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Short train trip from Narita Airport  and station in Narita City close to hotel. Shops restaurants near by.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location to the station
reviews.negatives: Older style building and fittings

reviews.title: 10/10 would stay again
reviews.text: Conveniently located to both Narita and Keisei Narita stations, there’re three convenience stores within a five min walk as well. I was suspicious because of the low cost but other than the old fashioned decor and slightly elderly elevator — all of which was in good repair — I can find nothing to nitpick. Front desk also provides skincare products (same DHC ones offered by the MyStays chain). Ngl there’s a slightly spooky vibe to the place late at night but as a landing zone to catch my breath for the last two nights of my vacation, it more than served its purpose. Am already planning to stay again on my next trip.

reviews.title: Good value. Excellent location.
reviews.positives: The location! Very close to the train station and many restaurants and convenience stores nearby.
reviews.negatives: Tad old.

reviews.title: Great value. Better than a capsule hotel or hostel
reviews.text:
This was a great budget place to stay for 2 people, very close to Senso Ji temple and the heart of Asakusa. 

Our room was like our own tiny 2 person capsule room, which I liked because it's got the budget of a capsule hotel, with a bit more privacy and a tiny amount of private room to spread your luggage out. 

It is right next to a convenience store, which was... convenient. 

It was also very new and clean.

reviews.title: Would come again
reviews.positives: Super close to the railway station, so easy access from the airport. I stayed only one day, but more days would have also been okay. I don't mind some furniture showing its age because everything is kept clean and working. It was more quiet than expected, no disturbance from the trains for me. Room a bit bigger than other hotels in Narita which I liked. Would come again, good value for money.
reviews.negatives: Can't say anything about breakfast.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable
reviews.text: The facilities (air conditioning, toilet, etc.) felt somewhat old, but they were very clean and comfortable to spend time in. Additionally, the rates were reasonable; I applied for a single room, but I actually got a double room. The reception staff's response was also good. Since I stayed for business, the location was convenient as it was right next to the station, but it was a bit disappointing that there were almost no commercial facilities in the surrounding area.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great spot to spend New Years Eve in
reviews.negatives: Room was not and had to open window to cool

reviews.title: 5-star service from this 3-star hotel
reviews.text: The hotel may be a little old, but the spirits of the staff aren't dampened. I had a huge problem with luggage delay and having to extend my trip, and both Kawamura-san and Endo-san put in a lot of effort to help solve my problem while maximising my comfort and letting me know that help was at hand. They all also have a sense of humour, which I appreciated in my time of need. I would definitely recommend this hotel for its great service and location.

reviews.title: Convenient location outside of Tokyo and close to Narita airport
reviews.positives: Close to the Narita airport, train station, shopping and sightseeing.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Welcome respite from a horrible flight
reviews.text: I've stayed here when it was the Mercure, so I knew where it was. What I didn't count on was a flight from the US delayed by 7 hours, such that I got to Narita well after my planned check-in. The staff checked me in when I got there, and the next morning they assisted in getting my suitcase forwarded to my temporary apartment in Tokyo. The night staff was courteous, and the morning staff cheerful and very helpful. I wish I had had the time to get the breakfast buffet, it looked awesome, both the Japaese and Western styles. Highly recommend this for convenience to Narita Airport (one train stop away on either Keisei or JR), and a great way to ease yourself into Japan.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Two buildings connected only on the 3. Floor.

reviews.title: Perfect for layovers
reviews.text: If you have a day to kill this is the spot. Right next to the station with plenty of places to eat. Rooms are much larger than in Tokyo and cleanliness is very good. Beds are comfortable as well. Will stay here again.
reviews.room_type: Triple room, No view, Non-smoking (Triple Room [Non-Smoking] ☆ Free High-Speed Wi-Fi)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
My stay at Welco Narita Hotel is a good choice for staying around Narita station.

The location is exceptionally convenient from Narita station. The rooms are clean and provided everything needed for a comfortable stay.

The staff were professional, courteous and helpful. 
Additional facilities such as coin laundry, a convenience store, and free parking add to the hotel's practicality for both short and extended stays.

Overall, Welco Narita Hotel delivers excellent value with its combination of convenient location, comfortable accommodations, and attentive service.
reviews.negatives: The rooms, though clean, felt dated and showed signs of wear. The air conditioning system was also problematic, struggling to maintain a comfortable temperature.

reviews.title: Best location
reviews.text: Been a regular in this hotel. Once step out of hotel, transportation availability is in front of our eyes. Walk down Omotesando shopping street, plentiful with different foods are available. Surely will come back to this hotel on my next visit.

reviews.title: convenient location and comfortable stay.I did not stay long enough to experience the entire hotel.
reviews.positives: location and comfortable bed as well as the night attire provided
reviews.negatives: a little bit of a smell, like something left wet.

reviews.title: Unfriendly staff
reviews.text: Me and my children (less than 10 yo) arrived late at night on winter day. The front staff didn't even greet us, instead asking for “your passport”. No smile, no welcome words, didn’t even offer us water served on the table (I found it free the next day), even when my kids said thirsty.

reviews.title: This is my repeated stay.
reviews.positives: Great location. Short walk to the Train stations.   Room is very reasonable size but quite dated.    Staff speaks English and helpful.
reviews.negatives: There is No shuttle bus /van to and from the airport .

reviews.title: ห้องใหญ่ เดินทางง่าย ปลอดภัย
reviews.text: ที่พักเดินทางสะดวกทั้งมาจากสนามบิน และเข้าเมืองมีร้านสะดวกซื้อรอบๆ ใกล้สถานีบัส และรถไฟ แนะนำ

reviews.title: It was a very pleasant stay
reviews.positives: Just 5 minutes away from the airport by train. And it’s just right next to Keisei and JR stations. The hotel is old but the room were really spacious
reviews.negatives: Outdated maybe needs a little renovation

reviews.title: Clean and good location
reviews.text: The location was fantastic. The room size was big given the price.  Will definitely stay here again if visiting narita

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Great location, just by the train station. We choose this hotel as our first stay on a Japan backpacking trip, and it was perfect for that. Good food options nearby, as well as a very nice shrine.

The staff was nice and let us deposit our luggage.
reviews.negatives: The building also seems to serve as a host for business meetings, and some of the rooms are in another part of the building, so need to walk some steps to get to your room.
